name: Web Browser Cookie Theft
description: Detects access to browser cookie databases for session hijacking
query:
// Detect access to browser cookie stores
// Trigger on reading Chrome, Firefox, or Edge cookie databases
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(Cookies|cookies\.sqlite|Login Data|logins\.json|\\Google\\Chrome\\User Data|\\Mozilla\\Firefox\\Profiles)"
  and exe_path not matches "(?i)(chrome|firefox|msedge)\.exe$"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
